ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "height_low_inches" INTEGER /* Lower bound of height range in inches */,
  "height_high_inches" INTEGER /* Upper bound of height range in inches */,
  "weight_low_lbs" INTEGER /* Lower bound of weight range in pounds */,
  "weight_high_lbs" INTEGER /* Upper bound of weight range in pounds */,
  "lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the breed */,
  "coat_type" TEXT /* Type of coat (e.g., short, long, wire) */,
  "coat_color" TEXT /* Common coat colors */,
  "temperament" TEXT /* Temperament of the breed */,
  "vulnerabilities" TEXT /* Common health issues or vulnerabilities */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the breed */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* General activity level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "intelligence" TEXT /* Intelligence level of the breed */,
  "suitable_for_families" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the breed is suitable for families with children */,
  "suitable_for_apartments" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the breed is suitable for apartment living */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise plan */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed the plan is for */,
  "reps_lower" INTEGER /* Lower bound of repetition range */,
  "reps_upper" INTEGER /* Upper bound of repetition range */,
  "frequency_per_week" INTEGER /* Recommended frequency of the exercise plan per week */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Recommended duration of each exercise session in minutes */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the exercise plan */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the exercise plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_plans_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the exercise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exercise */,
  "calories_burned_per_minute" REAL /* Average calories burned per minute for the exercise */,
  "equipment_needed" TEXT /* Equipment required for the exercise */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_exercises" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the exercise is included in */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise */,
  "sets" INTEGER /* Number of sets to perform */,
  "rest_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Recommended rest time between sets in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id", "exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., veterinarian, trainer, dog owner) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dogs" (
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dog */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed the dog is */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the dog */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dog */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the dog */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the dog */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dog is spayed or neutered */,
  "coat_color" TEXT /* Coat color of the dog */,
  "weight_lbs" INTEGER /* Current weight of the dog in pounds */,
  "height_inches" INTEGER /* Current height of the dog in inches */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Current activity level of the dog */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any known health conditions of the dog */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the dog */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dog was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise session */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog the session is for */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise plan used */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the session took place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the exercise session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the exercise session */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the exercise session in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Total calories burned during the session */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who conducted the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_sessions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES exercise_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_sessions_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_exercises" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the exercise was performed in */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise */,
  "sets_completed" INTEGER /* Number of sets completed */,
  "reps_completed" INTEGER /* Number of repetitions completed */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the exercise in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog the outcome is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "weight_lbs" INTEGER /* Weight of the dog at the time of the health outcome */,
  "height_inches" INTEGER /* Height of the dog at the time of the health outcome */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian who recorded the health outcome */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the health outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_veterinarian_id FOREIGN KEY ("veterinarian_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_efficacy" (
  "efficacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficacy record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise plan */,
  "efficacy" REAL /* Efficacy of the plan (e.g., 0.8 for 80%) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of dogs used in the efficacy study */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the efficacy measurement */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the efficacy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_efficacy_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES exercise_plans ("plan_id")
)
